title: Magi Extraction: move Magi to OrreryMagi target + AgentExecutor protocol + package graph fix
notes: Unblocked by D16 of 2026-04-18-orrery-spec-mcp-tool discussion — Spec MVP now complete (2026-04-22)

D1-D15 + Gemini 9-ticket plan covers: extract SessionEntry DTO, make findScopedSessions public, introduce AgentExecutor protocol + ProcessAgentExecutor, move Magi/* to new OrreryMagi target, break OrreryCore→OrreryMagi cycle by moving MagiCommand to executable target, reorganize MCP tool registration, add CONTRACT-OrreryMagi.md
Phase 1 only — L10n stays shared (D9), Package.swift target is library but repo is single (D1); Phase 2 repo split deferred to 2026-07-01 Go/No-Go review (D15)
Important: SpecImplementRunner (completed 2026-04-22) also uses SessionResolver.findScopedSessions — making it public is non-breaking for it since SpecImplementRunner stays in OrreryCore

status_history.note: D16 of 2026-04-18-orrery-spec-mcp-tool: delay until Spec MVP ships
Spec MVP completed; unblocking per D16 reverse dependency

status_history.session: picking up Magi extraction T1: SessionEntry + typealias + findScopedSessions public

status_history.note: M1-M8 complete. 166 tests green. CONTRACT-OrreryMagi.md added with 2026-07-01 Go/No-Go anchor. MagiMCPTools extraction reviewed by gemini (PASS, bit-for-bit argv equivalence). User-facing behaviour unchanged.
